opinion.h4: BARNETT v. NEVADA. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF NEVADA. No. 48, Misc. Decided May 22, 1967.
opinion.p: Harvey Dickerson, Attorney General of Nevada, for respondent.

The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for a writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded to the Supreme Court of Nevada for further consideration in light of Anders v. California, 386 U.S. 738, and Long v. District Court of Iowa in and for Lee County, 385 U.S. 192.
